replies.msg:
筲箕灣望隆街一號合隆工廠大廈15B

煩請各位出email

1. Email: enquiry@bd.gov.hk



Dear Sir/Madam,

It has come to my attention that the tenant of the subject premises, where its address can be referring to the attached document, is likely violating the relevant lease conditions.

I doubt if its is within the lease control for the operation of a fitness centre in an industrial building. If not, actions including reverting the land should be considered.

May I urge you as the lease administrator on behalf of the HKSAR to conduct investigations in regard to the subject matter. Thanks.

Regards,
Concerned citizen XXX

2. Email: landsd@landsd.gov.hk


Dear Sir/Madam,

It has come to my attention that the tenant of the subject premises, where its address can be referring to the attached document, is likely violating the relevant lease conditions.

I doubt if its is within the lease control for the operation of a fitness centre in an industrial building. If not, actions including reverting the land should be considered.

May I urge you as the lease administrator on behalf of the HKSAR to conduct investigations in regard to the subject matter. Thanks.

Regards,
Concerned citizen XXX

1. Email: enquiry@bd.gov.hk


Dear Sir/Madam,

It has come to my attention that the tenant of the subject premises, where its address can be referring to the attached document, is likely violating the Building Ordinance in particular thr UBWs.

I doubt if its is within the building control that the fitness centre in the above address to have suspected UBWs, which is a potential threat to the health and safety of the tenants. If not, actions including issuing statutory orders should be considered.

May I urge you to conduct site investigations in regard to the subject matter. Thanks.

Regards,
Concerned citizen Mr Li




2. Email: landsd@landsd.gov.hk


Dear Sir/Madam,

It has come to my attention that the tenant of the subject premises, where its address can be referring to the attached document, is likely violating the relevant lease conditions.

I doubt if its is within the lease control for the operation of a fitness centre in an industrial building. If not, actions including reverting the land should be considered.

May I urge you as the lease administrator on behalf of the HKSAR to conduct investigations in regard to the subject matter. Thanks.

Regards,
Concerned citizen XXX

quote.msg:
1. Email: enquiry@bd.gov.hk



Dear Sir/Madam,

It has come to my attention that the tenant of the subject premises, where its address can be referring to the attached document, is likely violating the relevant lease conditions.

I doubt if its is within the lease control for the operation of a fitness centre in an industrial building. If not, actions including reverting the land should be considered.

May I urge you as the lease administrator on behalf of the HKSAR to conduct investigations in regard to the subject matter. Thanks.

Regards,
Concerned citizen XXX

2. Email: landsd@landsd.gov.hk


Dear Sir/Madam,

It has come to my attention that the tenant of the subject premises, where its address can be referring to the attached document, is likely violating the relevant lease conditions.

I doubt if its is within the lease control for the operation of a fitness centre in an industrial building. If not, actions including reverting the land should be considered.

May I urge you as the lease administrator on behalf of the HKSAR to conduct investigations in regard to the subject matter. Thanks.

Regards,
Concerned citizen XXX
